name: claude-m-microsoft-marketplace
description: Focused Claude marketplace for Microsoft workflow plugins maintained in this repository.

plugins.name: microsoft-teams-mcp
plugins.description: Send messages, create meetings, and manage Teams channels via MCP.

plugins.name: microsoft-excel-mcp
plugins.description: Read and update workbooks, worksheets, ranges, and tables via MCP.

plugins.name: microsoft-outlook-mcp
plugins.description: Send email and manage inbox/calendar tasks via MCP.

plugins.name: microsoft-azure-mcp
plugins.description: Inspect subscriptions, resource groups, and resources via MCP.

plugins.name: microsoft-sharepoint-mcp
plugins.description: Browse and transfer SharePoint files through MCP tools.

plugins.name: excel-office-scripts
plugins.description: Deep knowledge of Excel Office Scripts (TypeScript 4.0.3, ExcelScript API) and Power Automate cloud flow creation via Dataverse Web API.

plugins.name: m365-platform-clients
plugins.description: TypeScript patterns for Dataverse Web API and Microsoft Graph with shared Azure Identity auth, typed clients, and combined provisioning workflows.

plugins.name: excel-automation
plugins.description: Clean messy data with pandas, generate Office Scripts and Power Automate flows, and create Excel templates — with Dataverse-aware mode and VBA fallback.

plugins.name: m365-admin
plugins.description: M365 tenant admin via Microsoft Graph — users, groups, licenses, Exchange Online, SharePoint, and CSV-driven bulk operations.

plugins.name: dataverse-schema
plugins.description: Create and manage Dataverse tables, columns, relationships, and solutions via Web API — with FetchXML generation and data seeding.

plugins.name: powerbi-fabric
plugins.description: Generate DAX measures, Power Query M code, manage workspaces via REST API, scaffold PBIP projects, and integrate with Microsoft Fabric.

plugins.name: powerplatform-alm
plugins.description: Application lifecycle management — environment provisioning, solution transport, CI/CD pipeline generation, and PCF control scaffolding.

plugins.name: onedrive
plugins.description: OneDrive file management via Microsoft Graph — upload, download, share, search, and delta sync for personal and business drives.

plugins.name: planner-todo
plugins.description: Task and project management via Microsoft Graph — Planner plans, buckets, tasks, assignments, and To Do lists with steps and recurrence.

plugins.name: azure-devops
plugins.description: Azure DevOps project management — Git repos, YAML pipelines, work items, pull requests, WIQL queries, and artifact feeds via REST API.

plugins.name: entra-id-security
plugins.description: Microsoft Entra ID identity governance — app registrations, service principals, conditional access policies, sign-in log analysis, and risk detection.

plugins.name: powerapps
plugins.description: Power Apps development — canvas app Power Fx formulas, model-driven app configuration, custom connectors, component libraries, and solution checker.

plugins.name: azure-cost-governance
plugins.description: Azure FinOps and governance workflows — query costs, monitor budgets, detect anomalies, and identify idle resources for optimization.

plugins.name: power-automate
plugins.description: Design and troubleshoot Power Automate cloud flows — trigger/action patterns, run diagnostics, retries, and deployment-safe flow definitions.

plugins.name: purview-compliance
plugins.description: Compliance and information protection guidance for Microsoft Purview — DLP, retention, sensitivity labels, and eDiscovery workflows.

plugins.name: azure-policy-security
plugins.description: Evaluate Azure policy compliance and security posture — policy assignments, drift analysis, remediation planning, and guardrail recommendations.

plugins.name: lighthouse-health
plugins.description: Multi-tenant health dashboard for MSPs/CSPs — green/yellow/red scoring for security posture, MFA coverage, stale accounts, and licensing anomalies with one-click remediation plans.

plugins.name: license-optimizer
plugins.description: Identify inactive and underused M365 licenses, map downgrade/upgrade candidates, estimate monthly savings, and generate multi-tenant Lighthouse reports for customer review meetings.

plugins.name: exchange-mailflow
plugins.description: Guided 'email not received' diagnostics — message trace, transport rules, quarantine, connectors, and SPF/DKIM/DMARC checks with client-safe explanations.

plugins.name: sharing-auditor
plugins.description: Audit external sharing across SharePoint and OneDrive — find overshared links, anonymous access, and stale guest users with approval-based revocation tasks.

plugins.name: teams-lifecycle
plugins.description: Create and archive teams with templates, enforce naming and ownership, apply sensitivity labels, and run expiration reviews — using non-technical 'project start/end' language.

plugins.name: servicedesk-runbooks
plugins.description: Guided workflows for common IT tickets — shared mailbox access, MFA reset, file recovery, and password reset with pre-checks, approval gates, and end-user verification.

plugins.name: microsoft-bookings
plugins.description: Microsoft Bookings — manage appointment calendars, services, staff availability, and customer bookings via Graph API.

plugins.name: microsoft-forms-surveys
plugins.description: Microsoft Forms — create surveys, add questions, collect responses, and summarize results via Graph API.

plugins.name: microsoft-lists-tracker
plugins.description: Microsoft Lists — create and manage lists for process tracking, issue logs, and project trackers via Graph API.

plugins.name: copilot-studio-bots
plugins.description: Copilot Studio — design bot topics, author trigger phrases, configure generative AI orchestration, and publish chatbots.

plugins.name: onenote-knowledge-base
plugins.description: OneNote Knowledge Base — read, create, and search notebooks, sections, and pages via Graph API for team documentation.
